title: taraxacum atrans
intro: Taraxacum atrans, also known as the common dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum atrans include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce liver toxicity, and improve skin and eye health. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum atrans can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support liver and kidney function, as well as to treat digestive issues.
